hypotheses.name: SV2/SV3 axes GO enrichment + gene-label null at layer-11
hypotheses.method: SVD of layer-11 mean-centered 209-gene embedding. Project onto SV2 and SV3. Take top/bottom 25% by projection. Fisher GO enrichment (BP+CC, size 5-200). Gene-label shuffle null (500 reps).
hypotheses.result_value: SV2: obs_p=1e-5 (GO:0032753 IL-4 sig, emp_p=0.000); SV3: obs_p=8.2e-4 (GO:0019886 antigen presentation, emp_p=0.088)
hypotheses.next_action: SV2 is a strong positive (emp_p=0.000, IL-4 immune signaling axis). Investigate SV2 bottom pole (GO:0070062 extracellular vesicle, emp_p TBD) and cross-layer SV2 stability.

hypotheses.name: Layer-specific compartment transients: mitochondrion (L3), ER lumen (L7/L8)
hypotheses.method: SVD of mean-centered 209-gene embedding at layer 3, 7, 8. Test enrichment of GO:0005739 (mitochondrion) and GO:0005788 (ER lumen) in top-25% SV1. Gene-label shuffle null (500 reps) for each layer.
hypotheses.result_value: mito_L3: OR=23.25 p=1e-7 emp_p=0.000; er_lumen_L7: OR=10.74 p=2.4e-4 emp_p=0.000; er_lumen_L8: OR=6.95 p=2.0e-3 emp_p=0.002
hypotheses.next_action: All three transients are highly significant. Confirm that mitochondrion effect at L3 disappears by L11 (cross-layer trajectory). Test additional compartments (nucleus, cytoplasm) at intermediate layers.

hypotheses.name: Signal peptide proxy vs SV1 top-pole (layer-11)
hypotheses.method: Proxy signal-peptide gene set = union of GO:0005615, GO:0005576, GO:0005788 annotated genes (60 genes). Fisher test: signal-peptide genes enriched in SV1 top-25%? Gene-label shuffle null (500 reps). Mann-Whitney U test on SV1 scores.
hypotheses.result_value: Fisher OR=2.88 p=1.5e-3 emp_p=0.002; MW p=2.4e-4; signal median SV1=-12.79 vs non-signal=-12.85
hypotheses.next_action: Signal-peptide proxy enrichment significant. Obtain ground-truth UniProt signal peptide annotations to test with curated set. Also test whether signal peptide genes concentrate specifically at SV1 top vs other SVs.
